content.text:
@echo off
chcp 65001 >nul 2>&1
setlocal

:: 与 PlatformSwitcher.bat 一致：按本机安装修改 Unity 路径
set "UNITY_PATH=C:\Program Files\Unity\Hub\Editor\2020.3.49f1\Editor\Unity.exe"

cd /d "%~dp0" || exit /b 1
set "PROJECT_PATH=%CD%"
set "LOG_FILE=%PROJECT_PATH%\BuildPipeline_RunHotUpdate.log"

if not exist "%UNITY_PATH%" (
    echo [ERROR] 未找到 Unity.exe，请编辑本 bat 中的 UNITY_PATH。
    exit /b 1
)

echo [INFO] projectPath=%PROJECT_PATH%
echo [INFO] 执行无参 RunHotUpdatePipeline：流水线「热更」的全部有效步骤
echo [INFO] log=%LOG_FILE%

"%UNITY_PATH%" -batchmode -quit -nographics -buildTarget Android -projectPath "%PROJECT_PATH%" -executeMethod YYZY.BuildPipeline.BuildPipeline.RunHotUpdatePipeline -logFile "%LOG_FILE%"

echo [INFO] Unity 退出码: %ERRORLEVEL%
exit /b %ERRORLEVEL%

content.thinking:
I see - the bat file launches Unity in batch mode with no graphics. It takes a long time. The previous exec call might have just returned without output because it backgrounded but the process finished immediately. Let me try running it again with a longer yield time or with the `background` option, then poll for results.

Actually, looking at the TOOLS.md instructions, it says the output should go to the log file. Let me run it properly this time. The issue was that the process finished or the exec returned quickly. Let me run it in the background and monitor the log file for progress.
